steps.title: Find Mother's creative actions
steps.content: The passage says Mother wrote stories for the children, read those stories aloud, and made up funny poems for birthdays and other occasions. Those details identify what is true about her.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported details
steps.content: Choice A invents a wish for more visitors. Choice B says birthdays are her favorite occasion, which the passage does not say. Choice D overstates reading as her favorite activity. The remaining statement accurately combines the stories and poems she makes for her children. The answer is C.
